rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header from image, no associated monetary amounts.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Values are clearly legible and conform to ledger structure. Fraction 3/4 is evident.

rows.description: July 23 Advanced to Mr Inman on acc't of the purchase
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's value. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this row with the subsequent sub-entry and extracted an incorrect amount (305 pounds instead of 5, and 8 pence instead of 0). Visual verification confirms the amount is £5, 16s, 0d.

Added this row, which was correctly identified as a distinct sub-entry by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed this row by incorrectly merging it with the preceding entry. Visual verification confirms it's an indented sub-entry connected by a brace, with no direct monetary amount.

rows.description: Letters & Parcels - for the year to Nov 2. 1825 -
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately reflects 'Nov 2.' and the trailing dash; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Novr. 2'.

rows.description: Nov 2 Tomus Wine Battels. Mids. & Mich. 1825 -
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it is more accurate; gpt-5-mini misread 'Tomus' as 'Forms' and 'Battels' as 'Bottles'.

rows.description: Repaid to Mr Clowes his Deposit for
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly isolates the first line of the entry. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this row with its subsequent sub-entry in its description.

Added this row, which was correctly identified as a distinct sub-entry by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed this row by incorrectly merging it with the preceding entry. Visual verification confirms it's an indented sub-entry connected by a brace, with no direct monetary amount.

Monetary values agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly transcribes the total numbers as the line's description; gpt-5-mini provided an empty description.
